headline: OpenAI confirmation cycle (sub-threshold). Composite 27.5 sustained. Musk v. Altman trial enters Week 2 with Greg Brockman scheduled to testify. New disclosure today: OpenAI revealed Musk sent Brockman a threatening text ('By the end of this week, you and Sam will be the most hated men in America') after Musk's settlement offer was rejected. Trial directly concerns OpenAI's nonprofit-to-PBC conversion — an active SYS / INT question with verdict pending. Verdict-pending events not scored per methodology v1.2. Pentagon classified-AI cohort participation confirmed May 1. INT -0.1 (Pentagon classified deal contradicts safety-research framing). Composite 27.5 → 26.7. Developing band sustained. Re-queue advisory: post-Brockman May 5, post-Altman May 12, advisory verdict May 21.
